node.statement: N1.4 (j(A) is contained in B_sa). Let a in A=Im P (def-near-fixed-algebra), so Pa=a (P^2=P and a=Pa', whence Pa=P^2 a'=Pa'=a; idempotency P^2=P from GT-Pprops). Then j(a)=j(Pa)=(jP)(a)=(Ftilde j)(a)=Ftilde(j(a)) by N1.2 (Ftilde j=jP). Hence j(a) is a fixed point of Ftilde, i.e. j(a) in Im Ftilde=B. Moreover a in A is self-adjoint (A subset B(H)_sa by def-near-fixed-algebra), and by GT-hyp j maps B(H)_sa into B(K)_sa, so j(a) in B(K)_sa is self-adjoint; thus j(a) in B cap B(K)_sa=B_sa. Therefore j(A) subset B_sa.
